name: Spring Vegetable Soup with Matzo Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the safflower oil in a large soup pot over moderate heat.
2. Add onion and celery; sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in potato, carrots, water, bouillon cubes, celery leaves, tomatoes, and cumin.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add cauliflower and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Remove from heat; let the soup cool completely.
8. Refrigerate overnight to develop flavor.
9. Just before serving, reheat the soup and add remaining ingredients (lettuce, peas).
10. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, adding more water if needed.
11. Serve with 3 to 4 matzo balls per bowl.
